nasb.text: saying with a loud voice, “Worthy is the Lamb that was slain to receive power and riches and wisdom and might and honor and glory and blessing.”

esv.text: saying with a loud voice, “Worthy is the Lamb who was slain, to receive power and wealth and wisdom and might and honor and glory and blessing!”

cnv.text: 大聲說： “被殺的羊羔是配得 權能、豐富、智慧、力量、 尊貴、榮耀、頌讚的！”

ccb.text: “那被杀的羔羊配得权柄、财富、智慧、能力、尊贵、荣耀和颂赞！”

csbs.text: 他们大声说： “那被杀的羔羊配接受 权能、财富、智慧、力量、 尊贵、荣耀和颂赞！”
